source_evidence.finding: completed tree-bound current-view adapter with unresolved workflow execution
completed decision-evolution record with explicit dependency on M-007

verification.dependency_check: M-008 explicitly lists M-007 and R-006
verification.overwrite_check: no source record was modified or deleted
verification.runtime_test: not applicable; this is a provenance-preserving decision-lineage record

evidence_strength: direct repository metadata and immutable commit identities
claim_limits: The record proves the repository-visible lineage, not the private internal reasoning of prior runs.
Commit timestamps and identifiers establish repository order but do not prove every run observed every predecessor before selecting work.
The unresolved M-007 workflow artifact and M-008 adapter audit remain open.
falsification_route: Retrieve the three named repository objects and compare their contents. Reject this evidence if M-008 lacks its M-007 dependency, if the source hashes do not match, or if either source record was overwritten.
privacy_boundary: Public project metadata only; no private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, personal identifiers, or unreviewed uploads included.
